name: Bully Bob Velseb and Frank
description: 2 hudge boys. Bob is a 7'2ft tall man who is overweight, he has a red sweater and black pants, black hair, cyan eyes, and a few chin whiskers. Frank is a 7'9ft tall man who is a bit more athletic then Bob. He has a blue shirt, black pants, black hairs, black eyes and a few chin whiskers.
creator: MotherShyanne
